zh.title: 熊画作 · 岁月留痕
zh.desc: 在生活笔记本里的即兴涂鸦。每一道线条都是对那一刻惬意生活的勾勒。

en.title: Bear Artwork · Traces of Time
en.desc: Impromptu graffiti in a life notebook. Every line is a sketch of the cozy life at that moment.

zh.title: 佳丽风景 · 留驻时光
zh.desc: 人间烟火里最灿烂的瞬间。那一天的微风和阳光，都保存在了这一格菲林中。

en.title: Beautiful Scenery · Freezing Time
en.desc: The most brilliant moment in worldly life. The breeze and sunshine of that day are preserved in this frame of film.

zh.title: 林间小道 · 绿色呼吸
zh.desc: 漫步在树林繁茂的郊外，深深呼吸充满泥土清香的空气。自然的美无处不在。

en.title: Forest Pathway · Green Breath
en.desc: Strolling through the dense forest, inhaling the scent of fresh soil. Nature's beauty is everywhere.

zh.title: 城市天际线 · 日落斜阳
zh.desc: 日落时分登上高楼天台，看着远方的落日缓缓沉入地平线，整座城市笼罩在一片金黄之中。

en.title: City Skyline · Sunset Dusk
en.desc: Climbing to the rooftop at dusk, watching the sun sink slowly below the skyline in golden rays.

zh.title: 清晨的第一杯咖啡
zh.desc: 研磨、冲泡，浓郁的咖啡香气弥漫了整个房间。拉开窗帘，美好的一天从现在开始。

en.title: First Cup of Coffee
en.desc: Grinding and brewing, rich aroma fills the air. Drawing curtains back, a wonderful day begins.

zh.title: 雨后彩虹 · 幸运如你
zh.desc: 骤雨初晴，窗外惊现一道宽广的彩虹。那一刻，内心充满了难以言喻的平静与喜悦。

en.title: Post-rain Rainbow
en.desc: After a sudden downpour, a majestic rainbow spans across the sky. Serenity fills the heart.

zh.title: 惬意午后 · 书香四溢
zh.desc: 靠在阳台的摇椅上，手捧一本闲书，在茶香与温暖日光中虚度一个完美的下午。

en.title: Cozy Afternoon Reading
en.desc: Reclining in the balcony chair with an interesting book, enjoying tea in the warm sunshine.

zh.title: 海风吹拂 · 蔚蓝海岸
zh.desc: 赤脚踩在松软的沙滩上，浪花轻轻拍打着脚踝。蔚蓝的大海无限广阔，令人心旷神怡。

en.title: Ocean Breeze · Azure Coast
en.desc: Walking barefoot on soft sand, waves gently brushing ankles. The azure ocean heals everything.

zh.title: 人间烟火 · 厨房交响
zh.desc: 周末亲自动手，煎炒烹炸。厨房里弥漫着诱人的香气，用一道道美食犒劳疲惫的自己。

en.title: Kitchen Symphony · Homemade Food
en.desc: Cooking up a storm on the weekend. The aroma of homemade food rewards a week of hard work.

zh.title: 落叶金秋 · 街头漫步
zh.desc: 落叶铺满了古老街巷的石板路，踩上去发出酥脆的声音。漫步其中，享受秋日静美。

en.title: Ginkgo Streets in Autumn
en.desc: Fallen leaves carpet the stone alleyways. Strolling through the cool, calm autumn air.

zh.title: 露营之夜 · 篝火熊熊
zh.desc: 和朋友们在山顶安营扎寨，围着篝火畅谈人生。抬头望去，是漫天闪烁的璀璨繁星。

en.title: Camping Night under Stars
en.desc: Setting camp on the mountain top, chatting around a warm bonfire under the starlit sky.

zh.title: 深夜食堂 · 温暖慰藉
zh.desc: 深夜推开路边小酒馆的木门，一碗热气腾腾的拉面，瞬间驱散了冬夜里的所有寒冷。

en.title: Late-night Diner Ramen
en.desc: Pushing open the tavern door on a freezing night; a steaming bowl of ramen warms the soul.

zh.title: 猫咪暖阳 · 萌宠治愈
zh.desc: 路边偶遇一只在阳光下伸懒腰的大橘猫。软绵绵地蹭着我的掌心，瞬间被彻底治愈。

en.title: Warm Cat under Sun
en.desc: Meeting a chubby ginger cat stretching under the sun. It nuzzles my palm, healing my soul.

zh.title: 骑行穿梭 · 追风少年
zh.desc: 骑上单车在环湖公路上自由飞驰。迎面而来的风，是关于自由、青春最好的诠释。

en.title: Cycling by the Lake
en.desc: Riding freely along the lakeside highway. The wind brushing past is the best symbol of youth.

zh.title: 冰雪奇缘 · 银装素裹
zh.desc: 冬天的第一场大雪将天地装点成一片银白。在雪地上踩下一串串脚印，清爽纯洁。

en.title: Snowy Wonderland
en.desc: The first heavy snow of winter blankets the world in white. Stepping on fresh, crisp snow.

zh.title: 音乐节狂欢 · 现场律动
zh.desc: 站在人潮汹涌的摇滚音乐节现场，跟随强烈的贝斯声尽情跃动。这一刻，只有音乐与快乐。

en.title: Music Festival Live
en.desc: Standing in the roaring crowd of a rock music festival, jumping to the bass. Pure ecstasy.

zh.title: 画展漫步 · 艺术熏陶
zh.desc: 漫步在静谧的美术馆展厅中，在一幅幅色彩斑斓的油画前驻足，寻找灵魂的共鸣。

en.title: Art Gallery Walk
en.desc: Wandering through the quiet art gallery, stopping before oil paintings to seek resonance.

zh.title: 古镇夜色 · 桨声灯影
zh.desc: 古镇水乡，青砖黛瓦。大红灯笼在夜色中亮起，倒映在古老的小河中，宁静祥和。

en.title: Water Town at Night
en.desc: Red lanterns lit in the ancient water town, casting warm reflections on the peaceful canal.

zh.title: 跨年倒计时 · 烟花璀璨
zh.desc: 在人潮人海的广场上，伴随零点钟声响起，璀璨的烟花腾空而起。新的一年，万事胜意。

en.title: New Year Fireworks
en.desc: Standing in the crowd as the midnight bell tolls, fireworks paint the sky. Happy New Year!

zh.title: 老街旧书店 · 淘书时光
zh.desc: 挤进不起眼的老街书店，指尖滑过泛黄的旧书页，在时光流转中淘到一份绝版的快乐。

en.title: Old Street Bookstore
en.desc: Squeezing into a vintage bookstore, running fingers along yellowed pages to find hidden gems.

zh.title: 毕业旅行 · 远方的风
zh.desc: 和好友一拍即合的毕业旅行。走过的山川大河，都将成为我们记忆库里最耀眼的存在。

en.title: Graduation Road Trip
en.desc: A spontaneous road trip with friends. The majestic mountains and rivers are treasures in our hearts.

zh.title: 毕业聚餐 · 不诉离别
zh.desc: 毕业聚会的饭桌上，大家推杯换盏。说好不哭，但眼眶里闪动的，全是滚烫的青春。

en.title: Graduation Farewell Party
en.desc: Toast after toast at the graduation banquet. We promised not to cry, yet tears of youth flow.

zh.title: 漫天飞舞的泡泡
zh.desc: 午后广场上，小孩子们吹出的漫天泡泡在折射出七彩的光芒。那一刻，仿佛回到了童年。

en.title: Dancing Bubbles in Sun
en.desc: Countless colorful soap bubbles dancing in the sun at the plaza, bringing back childhood memories.

zh.title: 火车站站台 · 踏上新程
zh.desc: 拉着厚重的行李箱站在人头攒动的站台上。离别的钟声响起，我们终将奔向不同的远方。

en.title: Railway Station Platform
en.desc: Holding suitcases on the busy platform. Farewell bell rings; we embark on different journeys.

zh.title: 新居入伙 · 满怀憧憬
zh.desc: 在工作的城市租下了属于自己的第一个小空间。亲手组装桌椅，开启新的人生的篇章。

en.title: My First Rented Apartment
en.desc: Renting my own cozy space in the new city. Building furniture by hand to start a new chapter.

zh.title: 地铁通勤 · 城市脉搏
zh.desc: 早高峰挤在地铁人流中，耳边是列车轰鸣。虽然步履匆匆，但心中依然有光、有方向。

en.title: Subway Rush Hour
en.desc: Squeezing into the subway during morning peak, train roaring. Stepping fast with a clear goal.

zh.title: 第一份薪水 · 分享喜悦
zh.desc: 拿到人生第一份正式工资，激动地挑了一份礼物寄给父母。这是独立与成长的第一步。

en.title: First Salary Gift
en.desc: Receiving my first official salary, buying gifts for my parents. A milestone of independence.

zh.title: 格子间里的夕阳
zh.desc: 下班前抬头望去，夕阳的余晖透过写字楼的落地窗，温柔地亲吻着忙碌的键盘与书桌。

en.title: Sunset in the Office
en.desc: Looking up before leaving work; the golden setting sun kisses the busy keyboards and desks.

zh.title: 重聚烧烤摊 · 友情无价
zh.desc: 周末跟在同城奋斗的老友们重聚在烟熏火燎的烧烤摊前，大口撸串，仿佛我们从未毕业。

en.title: Reunion BBQ Stand
en.desc: Gathering with college friends at a smoky BBQ stall on weekends. Laughing like we never left.

zh.title: 星空璀璨 · 未来可期
zh.desc: 夜深人静，望着窗外无垠的星空。前方的路或许漫长，但只要心怀热爱，终能抵达彼岸。

en.title: Starry Night · Boundless Future
en.desc: Looking at the starry sky in the quiet night. The road ahead is long, but love will guide us.
